title: dryopteris calcarata var. sericea
intro: Dryopteris calcarata var. sericea, also known as the silvery-veined wood fern, is a variety of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus and is native to Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight bacterial infections. The health benefits of Dryopteris calcarata var. sericea include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extract is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
